title: Fig 2 in Development of specific PCR assays for the detection of Cryptocaryon irritans
author: Chen, W.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig 2 Agarose gel electrophoresis of PCR products amplified from mixed genomic DNA of C. irritans and I. multifiliis. Lanes 1 and 7 represent a DNA size marker. Lane 2 presents the mixture of C. irritans and I. multifiliis DNA amplified using the primer set P1/S15 and lane 3 represents the genomic DNA of I. multifiliis. Lane 4 represents the mixed genomic DNA of C. irritans and I. multifiliis amplified using the primer set S01–S02. Lane 5 represents the genomic DNA of C. irritans using the primer set S01–S02. Lane 6 represents no-DNA control
